post.message: Source file src/components/crm/FuncionarioModal.tsx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.
post.judgeRationale: judge dissented: The PR title claims to separate the HR ranking into Absences and Late/Early Departures, and the diff modifies `RankingFaltas.tsx` to filter and display these categories separately while updating the data model and hooks to support the new `CategoriaFalta` type.
